name: supply-watch-ai
description: SupplyWatch AI — Real-time supply chain disruption prediction & replan recommendation platform

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others --prefix '[{name}]' --names 'backend,ml,frontend' --prefix-colors 'cyan,magenta,yellow' "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix ml-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.db:migrate: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U sw_user -d supplywatch -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01_schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U sw_user -d supplywatch -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/02_seed.sql
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
